description: Authoritative model policy for all AInchors agents. Warden enforces this. Changes require Ken approval + CHG entry + baseline update.
approvalContext: Initial policy capture. TKT-0013. All known exceptions documented.

main.escalationRule: High-stakes tasks or 2x failure only. Ken must approve or task must qualify per RULES.md.
main.rationale: US11 model strategy. Sonnet is default. Opus only for escalation. Gemma4 for background crons only.

business.escalationRule: No Opus. Aria never escalates to Opus — cost control for business stream.
business.rationale: CHG-0037 + Option C decision 2026-04-27 21:18 AEST. Gemma4 cold-load caused 30-60s freezes on Telegram. Sonnet only. Opus prohibited — business stream cost control.

security.escalationRule: No escalation. Security reviews must be consistent and cost-controlled.
security.rationale: Governance agents run Sonnet for consistency. No Opus (cost), no Gemma4 (quality risk for security reviews).

legal.escalationRule: Opus is the primary model for Lex. Legal accuracy justifies the cost premium.
legal.exceptionReason: Lex is the only agent authorised to run Opus as its PRIMARY model. Legal review accuracy is non-negotiable. Documented exception — not drift.
legal.rationale: Legal agent requires highest accuracy. Opus primary is an intentional, documented exception to the Sonnet-default rule.

qa.escalationRule: No escalation. QA reviews must be consistent and cost-controlled.
qa.rationale: Governance agents run Sonnet for consistency.

governance.escalationRule: Warden never escalates. Lightweight compliance checks only.
governance.rationale: Warden is a lightweight monitor. Sonnet only. No exceptions.

cronModelPolicy.description: Allowed models for cron job payloads. Gemma4 is only permitted for specific background tasks.

changeControl.process: 1. Ken approval in webchat/Telegram. 2. Update this file. 3. Update critical-config-baseline.json. 4. Log CHG entry. 5. Update MEMORY.md.
